sentences.target: Die Glocken klingen heute besonders hell.

translations.de: Die Glocken klingen heute besonders hell.
translations.en: The bells sound especially bright today.
translations.es: Hoy las campanas suenan especialmente claras.
translations.fr: Le son des cloches est particulièrement clair aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi le campane suonano particolarmente limpide.
translations.pt: Hoje os sinos soam especialmente claros.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tiếng chuông nghe đặc biệt trong.
translations.ar: اليوم صوت الأجراس يبدو صافيا بشكل خاص.
translations.nl: Vandaag klinken de klokken extra helder.
translations.hu: Ma a harangok különösen tisztán szólnak.
translations.hi: आज घंटियाँ खास तौर पर साफ़ सुनाई दे रही हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα οι καμπάνες ακούγονται ιδιαίτερα καθαρά.
translations.nb: I dag låter klokkene ekstra klart.
translations.id: Hari ini bunyi lonceng terdengar sangat jernih.
translations.sv: I dag låter klockorna extra klart.
translations.ro: Astăzi clopotele sună deosebit de clar.
translations.da: I dag lyder klokkerne særligt klart.
translations.ja: 今日は鐘の音がひときわ澄んで聞こえる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; marks nominative plural subject.
Common noun; plural; serves as sentence subject.
Main verb; finite present (3rd person plural); intransitive meaning 'to sound'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'hell'.
Predicative adjective functioning as complement to 'klingen'.

translations.ko: 그 노래는 괜찮게 들릴 수도 있어요.
translations.vi: Bài hát này có thể nghe hay.
translations.nl: Het liedje zou goed kunnen klinken.
translations.hu: A dal lehet, hogy jól szól.
translations.hi: यह गाना अच्छा सुनाई दे सकता है.
translations.el: Το τραγούδι μπορεί να ακούγεται καλά.
translations.ro: Melodia ar putea să sune bine.
translations.cs: Ta písnička by mohla znít dobře.
translations.ja: その曲はよく聞こえるかもしれない。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; marks neuter nominative singular subject.
Common noun; neuter; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary; finite (Konjunktiv II); selects bare infinitive 'klingen'.
Manner adverb modifying 'klingen'.
Main verb; bare infinitive governed by the modal.

sentences.target: Das Mikrofon lässt meine Stimme leiser klingen.
sentences.reading: /das miːkʁoˈfoːn lɛst ˈmaɪnə ˈʃtɪmə ˈlaɪzɐ ˈklɪŋən/

translations.de: Das Mikrofon lässt meine Stimme leiser klingen.
translations.ipa: /das miːkʁoˈfoːn lɛst ˈmaɪnə ˈʃtɪmə ˈlaɪzɐ ˈklɪŋən/
translations.en: The microphone makes my voice sound quieter.
translations.es: El micrófono hace que mi voz suene más suave.
translations.fr: Le micro rend ma voix plus faible.
translations.it: Il microfono fa sembrare la mia voce più debole.
translations.ko: 마이크 때문에 제 목소리가 더 작게 들려요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个麦克风让我的声音听起来更小声。
translations.yue: 呢支咪令我把聲聽起嚟更細聲。
translations.ru: Этот микрофон делает мой голос тише.
translations.pt: O microfone deixa minha voz mais baixa.
translations.he: המיקרופון גורם לקול שלי להישמע חלש יותר.
translations.tr: Mikrofon yüzünden sesim daha kısık çıkıyor.
translations.vi: Cái micro làm giọng tôi nghe nhỏ hơn.
translations.nl: De microfoon laat mijn stem zachter klinken.
translations.uk: Цей мікрофон робить мій голос тихішим.
translations.hu: A mikrofon halkabbá teszi a hangomat.
translations.hi: माइक्रोफ़ोन मेरी आवाज़ को धीमा कर देता है.
translations.pl: Mikrofon sprawia, że mój głos brzmi ciszej.
translations.el: Το μικρόφωνο κάνει τη φωνή μου να ακούγεται πιο σιγά.
translations.nb: Mikrofonen får stemmen min til å låte svakere.
translations.id: Mikrofon membuat suara saya terdengar lebih pelan.
translations.sv: Mikrofonen får min röst att låta svagare.
translations.ro: Microfonul îmi face vocea să sune mai încet.
translations.cs: Mikrofon způsobuje, že můj hlas zní tišeji.
translations.da: Mikrofonen får min stemme til at lyde mere dæmpet.
translations.ja: マイクのせいで声が小さく聞こえる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; marks neuter nominative singular subject.
Common noun; subject in a causative construction with 'lassen'.
Causative verb; finite present (3rd person singular); takes an infinitival complement.
Possessive determiner; agrees with 'Stimme'; modifies the object.
Common noun; accusative object affected in the causative construction.
Comparative degree adverb modifying 'klingen'.
Verb; bare infinitive complement of 'lässt'.

sentences.target: Im Flur klingen die Schritte sehr laut.
sentences.reading: /ɪm fluːɐ̯ ˈklɪŋən diː ˈʃʁɪtə zeːɐ̯ laʊt/

translations.de: Im Flur klingen die Schritte sehr laut.
translations.ipa: /ɪm fluːɐ̯ ˈklɪŋən diː ˈʃʁɪtə zeːɐ̯ laʊt/
translations.en: In the hallway, the footsteps sound very loud.
translations.es: En el pasillo, los pasos suenan muy fuerte.
translations.fr: Dans le couloir, les pas résonnent très fort.
translations.it: Nel corridoio i passi risuonano molto forte.
translations.zh-Hans: 在走廊里，脚步声听起来很响。
translations.yue: 喺走廊度，腳步聲聽落去好大聲。
translations.ru: В коридоре шаги звучат очень громко.
translations.pt: No corredor, os passos soam muito alto.
translations.tr: Koridorda ayak sesleri çok yüksek geliyor.
translations.vi: Trong hành lang, tiếng bước chân nghe rất to.
translations.ar: في الممر، صوت الخطوات يبدو عالياً جداً.
translations.nl: In de gang klinken de voetstappen heel hard.
translations.uk: У коридорі кроки звучать дуже голосно.
translations.hu: A folyosón a léptek nagyon hangosan hallatszanak.
translations.hi: गलियारे में कदमों की आवाज़ बहुत तेज़ सुनाई देती है.
translations.pl: W korytarzu kroki brzmią bardzo głośno.
translations.el: Στον διάδρομο οι πατημασιές ακούγονται πολύ δυνατά.
translations.nb: I gangen høres skrittene veldig høyt.
translations.id: Di lorong, langkah kaki terdengar sangat keras.
translations.sv: I hallen låter stegen väldigt högt.
translations.ro: Pe hol, pașii se aud foarte tare.
translations.cs: V chodbě kroky znějí velmi nahlas.
translations.da: I gangen lyder skridtene meget højt.
translations.ja: 廊下では足音がとても大きく聞こえる。

tokens.explanation: Preposition as contracted form of 'in dem'; introduces a dative locative phrase.
Common noun; dative object of the preposition; locative setting.
Main verb; finite present (3rd person plural).
Definite article; marks nominative plural subject.
Common noun; plural; subject (footsteps).
Degree adverb intensifying 'laut'.
Predicative adjective complement of 'klingen'.
